188F:01A0.label: func_run_dialog
188F:01A0.comment:
Sets up and shows the dialog at struct 0x03B0, then handles input.
Populates status bar text (0x43DC) and title string (0x40F6) before drawing.
Called in response to a key press (F2). Closes and restores screen on exit.

188F:11E0.label: func_set_pit_rate
188F:11E0.comment:
Programs the PIT timer with a rate from the frequency table at 0x171E.
Index is [0x176C]; reload value stored in [0x17A0] then written to PIT via func_program_pit.

188F:11F3.label: func_load_sound_config
188F:11F3.comment:
Initializes FM voice state and loads sound parameters from config block at 0x43B0.
Iterates 5 voice structs at 0x1586, then reads settings (volume, tempo, voices, SB params)
from 0x43B0 via lodsw and distributes them to their respective state variables.

188F:12E1.label: func_start_audio
188F:12E1.comment:
Starts the audio system: loads sound config, programs the PIT timer rate,
saves current INT 8/9/SB vectors, then installs own INT 8 (music tick at 188F:132E)
and INT 9 (keyboard at 188F:1381) handlers. Sets [0x17AA]=1 when done.

188F:151A.label: func_program_pit
188F:151A.comment:
Programs PIT channel 0 with the reload value in AX.
Writes mode byte 0x36 (ch0, mode 3, 16-bit binary) to port 0x43, then AX low/high to port 0x40.

188F:17C0.label: func_save_int_vectors
188F:17C0.comment:
Saves current INT 8 (timer), INT 9 (keyboard), and SB hardware IRQ vectors.
INT number for SB IRQ is read from [0x38B0]. Saved to [0x1770..177A] for later restore.

188F:2BBA.label: func_dialog_event_loop
188F:2BBA.comment: Stub — single ret. Would be the dialog interaction loop between func_start_audio and func_close_dialog_box.

188F:4FEF.label: func_save_screen_region
188F:4FEF.comment:
Saves a rectangular text-mode screen region to a memory buffer.
Args: start_pos (AH=row, AL=col), end_pos (AH=row, AL=col), dest (far ptr), attr_filter
Synchronizes each word copy with the CGA retrace signal to avoid snow.

188F:50EA.label: func_draw_dialog_box
188F:50EA.comment:
Draws a dialog box from a struct ptr (bp+0x04).
Struct: +00 top_left, +02 bot_right (AH=row/AL=col), +04..09 border chars (┌─┐│└┘),
+0a title str ptr, +0c/0e screen save buf (allocated here), +10 title attr, +11 body attr,
+12 item attr, +18 items array ptr, +1a status bar str ptr (0=skip status bar save).
Returns 1 on success.

188F:506C.label: func_restore_screen_region
188F:506C.comment:
Restores a rectangular screen region from a memory buffer back to the CGA video buffer.
Mirror of func_save_screen_region: reads from source far ptr, writes to B800 with retrace sync.

188F:55DA.label: func_close_dialog_box
188F:55DA.comment:
Restores the screen saved by func_draw_dialog_box and frees the buffer.
If struct[+1a] is non-null, also restores the status bar row.
Pair of func_draw_dialog_box.

lineComments.188F:01CC: 0x43DC = status bar text buffer for this dialog (struct[+1a]); populated before drawing
lineComments.188F:01FA: 0x40F6 = dialog title string buffer (struct[+0a]); populated before drawing
lineComments.188F:020E: func_draw_dialog_box returns 0 if buffer allocation failed; skip input loop in that case
lineComments.188F:021C: close dialog: restore screen from saved buffer and free it
lineComments.188F:11E8: PIT reload value from frequency table: base 0x171E + [0x176C]*2; controls music tick rate
lineComments.188F:12E8: [0x02FE] = mode flag; 0 = initial state, skip conditional SB hardware init
lineComments.188F:12FF: INT 21h/25h: install own INT 9 (keyboard) handler at 188F:1381
lineComments.188F:1307: INT 21h/25h: install own INT 8 (timer) handler at 188F:132E for music ticks
lineComments.188F:151D: PIT mode byte 0x36: channel 0, mode 3 (square wave), 16-bit binary count
lineComments.188F:17C0: INT 21h/35h: get INT 9 (keyboard) vector; save offset to [0x1770], segment to [0x1772]
lineComments.188F:17CD: INT 21h/35h: get INT 8 (timer) vector; save to [0x1774/1776]
lineComments.188F:17DA: get SB hardware IRQ vector; interrupt number is dynamic, stored at [0x38B0]
lineComments.188F:4FF9: start_pos: AH=row, AL=col; sequence below computes SI = (row*80 + col)*2, the byte offset in the video buffer
lineComments.188F:5018: 0xB800 = CGA color text segment; mode 7 (MDA mono) would use 0xB000 instead
lineComments.188F:5028: attr_filter: 0 = copy all chars; nonzero enables attribute-filtered path (gap at 502F, never executed)
lineComments.188F:5048: BL=0x09: CGA status mask — bit 0 = display enable / horizontal retrace, bit 3 = vertical sync
lineComments.188F:505B: 0xA0 = 160 bytes per text row (80 cols * 2 bytes each); step to next source row
lineComments.188F:5118: 0xA0 = 160 extra bytes at start of buffer to hold the optional status bar row
lineComments.188F:5255: AH = inner_row_count; packed into AH:00 then added to top_left pos to get first inner-row address
lineComments.188F:52BC: mask bot_right to row-only (clear AL), then add start_col to form bottom-left corner position
lineComments.188F:534B: scan for NUL to measure title string length; not+dec cx converts repne result to strlen
lineComments.188F:5354: halve the unused column gap to center the title: left_offset = (inner_width - title_len) / 2
lineComments.188F:5381: 0x0101: skip one cell in row (AH) and col (AL) inward from each border to get fill area bounds
